promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong bounded terrain-facing sims reduction after the Stage16 absolute/delta boundary pass and because the parent batch already isolates the local Terrain8 sign seam cleanly.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the standalone terrain-only sign suite, the local-versus-repo-top Terrain8 admission split, the Topology4 naming/provenance boundary, the nonuniform local sign asymmetry, and the raw-order boundary to the ultra2 macro bundle.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary batch was used for the nearest catalog/evidence separation packet, the Stage16 absolute/delta batch was used for the nearest local-versus-repo-top admission and next-family boundary pattern, and the later Topology4 Terrain8 seam batch was used as the strongest existing intake proof that the repo-top Terrain8 block belongs to a separate Axis12/Topology4 family.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because this pass stops at the ultra2 family boundary instead of absorbing the composite macro bundle.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent terrain8 sign-suite batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, Stage16 boundary, and Topology4 seam intake artifacts were sufficient to isolate the reusable terrain-sign asymmetry and Topology4-boundary packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: TERRAIN_ONLY_SIGN_SUITE_ISOLATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest local family-identity claim before Topology4 and macro-bundle comparisons are layered on top.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_TERRAIN8_SIM_ID_VERSUS_REPOTOP_TOPOLOGY4_ADMISSION_SPLIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest compression of the parent batch's main evidence contradiction.

candidate_items.name: TERRAIN8_NAME_SHARED_BUT_TOPOLOGY4_FAMILY_NONIDENTITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest Topology4-boundary packet in the parent batch without needing fresh raw comparison work.

candidate_items.name: NI_PRIMARY_SI_SECONDARY_NE_NEAR_INVARIANT_SIGN_ASYMMETRY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the sharpest local sign-asymmetry hierarchy instead of averaging the suite into one sign story.

candidate_items.name: STABLE_SE_NE_ORDERING_WITH_INCREMENTAL_SIGN_DELTA_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the local anti-flattening rule that baseline terrain order and incremental sign effects coexist.

candidate_items.name: ULTRA2_CATALOG_VISIBLE_NEXT_FAMILY_NONMERGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest next-family boundary packet in the parent batch while also keeping catalog visibility weaker than family identity or evidence admission.

quarantined_items.name: REPO_TOP_TOPOLOGY4_TERRAIN8_BLOCK_AS_LOCAL_TERRAIN_SUITE_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Repo-top admission of the Topology4 family is weaker than admission of the local terrain suite and would erase the parent's negative local SIM_ID match.

quarantined_items.name: SHARED_TERRAIN8_NAME_AS_NUMERIC_OR_CONTRACT_CONTINUITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Naming overlap is weaker than executable or result continuity and would incorrectly collapse the local suite into the Topology4 family.

quarantined_items.name: UNIFORM_SIGN_SENSITIVITY_OR_UNIFORM_SIGN_INVARIANCE_STORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves a strong local hierarchy from Ni to Si to near-zero Ne rather than a uniform response story.

quarantined_items.name: STABLE_ORDERING_AS_ZERO_SIGN_EFFECT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Stable Se/Ne ordering is weaker than zero incremental sign effect and would erase the preserved local sign gaps.

quarantined_items.name: ULTRA2_ADJACENCY_OR_CATALOG_COLOCATION_AS_FAMILY_MERGE_OR_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Adjacency and catalog placement are weaker than bounded-family identity or evidence admission and would overstate the terrain suite's relation to ultra2.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable terrain packets: local terrain-only identity, local-versus-Topology4 admission split, shared-name boundary discipline, terrain-specific sign-asymmetry hierarchy, stable ordering with incremental deltas, and the ultra2 next-family boundary.
They preserve the local terrain suite as a contradiction-rich comparison surface without letting repo-top Topology4 evidence, naming overlap, or raw adjacency flatten it into one family story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later terrain, Topology4, and ultra-family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain evidence-strength overreads, family-identity overreads, response-flattening overreads, or adjacency overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used the sims evidence-boundary and Stage16 boundary A2-mid batches plus the later Topology4 Terrain8 seam intake batch as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded terrain-sign asymmetry and Topology4-boundary reduction pass.
